◎简　　介  

　　O Crime Do Padre Amaro  is a skintillating adaptation of the titular novel that has scandalized Portugal since its publication in 1875. The story centers on the sinful Padre Amaro (Jorge Corrula), who has a decidedly non-celibate affair with beautiful parishioner Amélia (Soraia Chaves).
